title: RBI (Local Area Banks – Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Third Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI has amended the financial statement disclosure framework for Local Area Banks by revising reserve definitions and NPI provision reporting requirements. The changes aim to improve transparency and standardization in banking disclosures.
The post RBI (Local Area Banks – Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Third Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
